releaseNotes: Bulk-stock quantity column. Cards / OTCs without per-unit barcodes can now be entered as one row with a count (e.g. 15 cards of ibuprofen, lot ABC123, exp 2027-08-31, qty 15) instead of 15 near-duplicate rows. The dashboard shows a × N badge on bulk rows; tap the new −1 button to record one used. PAR computations now sum quantities, so bulk stock counts correctly toward thresholds.
